title: Coordinate Mapping Regressions
concept: Diagnosing how element scaling or responsive layouts broke coordinate-based clicking.

exercises.prompt: What can happen when UI agents try to interact with elements that are not in view?

options.text: This causes the agent to click incorrectly on the page.
Nothing happens; the agent waits patiently.
The agent will simply stop working altogether.

exercises.explain: UI agents can misclick or fail when they interact with elements that are not visible on the screen.

cards.title: Coordinate Mapping
cards.body: Coordinate mapping helps the system understand where elements are located on the screen. It's important for accurate clicking!

cards.title: What Is a Regression?
cards.body: A regression is when something that used to work perfectly breaks due to changes made elsewhere, like element scaling.

cards.title: Fixing a Broken Map
cards.body: Imagine having a map that shows where the roads are, but someone changes the road layout. Now you might get lost trying to find your way!

cards.title: Scaling Issues
cards.body: If a website's layout changes size on different devices, the coordinates for clicking can become incorrect, causing mistakes.

cards.title: It's Not Just About the Click
cards.body: Some think problems only happen when clicking. But layout changes can affect how everything interacts, not just clicks.

cards.title: Viewing Coordinates
cards.body: Differences in device sizes can change click accuracy. Let’s see:

exercises.prompt: What can cause coordinate mapping to break when an element resizes?

options.text: Responsive design that doesn't adjust correctly.
Using a mouse instead of touch.

exercises.explain: Responsive design issues can misalign the coordinates that agents rely on for accurate clicking.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Coordinate mapping works perfectly regardless of changes in element sizes.
exercises.explain: When elements change size, the mapped coordinates can become incorrect, causing failures.

exercises.prompt: When elements resize, the coordinates for ____ can become inaccurate.
exercises.sentence: When elements resize, the coordinates for clicking can become inaccurate.
exercises.explain: The word 'clicking' is specifically what gets affected when coordinates change.

exercises.prompt: Which of these would likely cause a misclick due to graphics being scaled on a webpage?

options.text: The header image is too large and off the screen.
An element moves because the page is responsive.
The text on buttons are too small to read.

exercises.explain: A responsive layout can shift elements around, causing the coordinates for clicks to be misaligned.

exercises.prompt: If a UI agent fails to click an item on a responsive webpage, which could be the cause?

options.text: The agent had a short timeout for loading.
The webpage had improper coordinate mapping due to scaling.
The agent was trained too fast without practice.
The browser was outdated, causing layout issues.

exercises.explain: Improper coordinate mapping related to scaling is a direct reason why clicking can fail.
